name: @tank/frontend-craft
description: Frontend craft for apps that feel fast, polished, and delightful. Micro-interactions (Framer Motion, spring physics), perceived performance (skeletons, optimistic updates), premium components (TanStack Table, cmdk, Sonner), visual polish, state choreography, component architecture (shadcn/ui, Radix, CVA). Triggers: micro-interaction, animation, skeleton, optimistic update, framer motion, command palette, data table, toast, sonner, cmdk, shadcn, UI polish, premium feel, page transition, form UX.
